description.value: Price 15,240 gp; Weight 1/2 lb.; Slot hands; CL 8th; Aura moderate abjuration DESCRIPTION These gloves of thick leather do not impair delicate work and grant a +4 competence bonus on Disable Device checks to disable magic traps. Once per day, a wearer trained in Disable Device can command the gloves to alter an unattended magic item she touches to incorporate a trap. The wearer attempts a caster level check using the higher of her caster level or the glovesâ caster level (DC = 11 + the target itemâs caster level ). If the check is successful, the target item is marked with a glyph of warding (blast glyph only) that lasts for up to 1 day. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 7,620 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells glyph of warding
